scripts.build: npm run check:positioning && npm run test:policy && node scripts/build-with-csp.mjs && npm run check:positioning:rendered
scripts.check:preview: npm run build && npm run check:indexing
scripts.check:links: cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4173 npm run build && start-server-and-test start:links http://127.0.0.1:4173 "linkinator http://127.0.0.1:4173 --recurse --skip ^mailto: --skip github.com/Ryan-AI-Studios/Ledgerful"
scripts.check:truth: npm run check:indexing && npm run check:positioning && node scripts/check-pricing-truth.mjs && node scripts/check-trust-truth.mjs && node scripts/check-docs-truth.mjs && node scripts/check-jsonld.mjs && node scripts/check-launch-truth.mjs && node scripts/check-proof-assets.mjs
scripts.check:deploy: node scripts/check-subresource-integrity.mjs && playwright test tests/e2e/public-site.spec.ts --grep "loads without runtime"
